minesweeper.title: Privacy Policy for Minesweeper
minesweeper.section1Text: When you use our App, we may collect certain information automatically, including:
minesweeper.section1List1: Device Information: Device model, operating system version, unique device identifiers (e.g., IDFA for iOS, Advertising ID for Android), and language settings.
minesweeper.section1List2: Usage Data: Statistics on your gameplay (wins, losses, levels reached), points earned, and interactions within the App.
minesweeper.section1List3: Purchase Data: Information related to in-app purchases (processed securely via Apple App Store, Google Play Store, and RevenueCat). We do not store your credit card information.
minesweeper.section2Text: We use the collected data to:
minesweeper.section2List1: Provide and maintain the App's functionality.
minesweeper.section2List2: Improve user experience and gameplay balance.
minesweeper.section2List3: Monitor and analyze App performance and stability (via Crashlytics and Sentry).
minesweeper.section2List4: Deliver personalized advertisements (via AdMob) based on your consent.
minesweeper.section2List5: Sync your progress across devices (via Google Play Games or Apple Game Center).
minesweeper.section3Text: We use third-party services that may collect information used to identify you. Below are the links to the privacy policies of these providers:
minesweeper.section4Text1: iOS Users: We request permission via the App Tracking Transparency (ATT) framework to use your device's advertising identifier for personalized ads.
minesweeper.section4Text2: EU/EEA Users: We use a Consent Management Platform (UMP) to comply with GDPR. You can manage or withdraw your consent at any time through the in-app settings.
minesweeper.section5Text: Our App does not specifically target children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13.
minesweeper.section6Text: We value your trust in providing us your information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable.
minesweeper.section7Text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. You are advised to review this page periodically for any changes.
minesweeper.section8Text: If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us at:
